SELECT stringToH3(index_str) AS index FROM h3_indexes;
SELECT stringToH3('89184926cc3ffff') AS index UNION SELECT stringToH3('0abcdef12345678') AS index;
SELECT h3.index_str FROM (SELECT stringToH3(index_str) AS index FROM h3_indexes) AS h3 WHERE h3.index > 0;
WITH (SELECT stringToH3('abcdef1234567890') AS index) AS h3_index SELECT h3_index;
SELECT h3.index_str, stringToH3(h3.index_str) AS h3_index FROM (SELECT * FROM h3_indexes) AS h3 WHERE h3_index = 0;
CREATE TABLE temp_results AS SELECT stringToH3(index_str) AS index FROM h3_indexes;
SELECT h3.index_str FROM temp_results AS h3 WHERE h3.index > 0 AND h3.index < 1000000;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_h3 AS SELECT index_str FROM h3_indexes WHERE index_str LIKE '891%';
SELECT stringToH3(index_str) AS index FROM temp_h3 WHERE index_str != '89184926cc3ffff';
SELECT count(*) AS valid_indexes FROM h3_indexes WHERE stringToH3(index_str) != 0;
